tluaMergedInterfaceNoDuplicate.tlua(15,22): error TLUA2717: Subsequent property declarations must have the same type.  Property 'v' must be of type 'number', but here has type 'string'.
tluaMergedInterfaceNoDuplicate.tlua(18,24): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'dup'.
tluaMergedInterfaceNoDuplicate.tlua(18,37): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'dup'.
tluaMergedInterfaceNoDuplicate.tlua(21,14): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'p'.
tluaMergedInterfaceNoDuplicate.tlua(21,25): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'p'.


==== tluaMergedInterfaceNoDuplicate.tlua (5 errors) ====
    // A property re-declared across merged interface declarations is ordinary
    // merging, not a duplicate identifier: the symbol gains several declarations,
    // but each body declares the name only once.
    interface Merged { x: number }
    interface Merged { x: number }
    
    // Adding distinct members across declarations merges cleanly too.
    interface Widened { a: number }
    interface Widened { b: string }
    
    // Re-declaring with a conflicting type is a "subsequent property declarations
    // must have the same type" error -- but still NOT a spurious duplicate
    // identifier from the per-body duplicate check.
    interface Conflict { v: number }
    interface Conflict { v: string }
                         ~
!!! error TLUA2717: Subsequent property declarations must have the same type.  Property 'v' must be of type 'number', but here has type 'string'.
!!! related TLUA6203 tluaMergedInterfaceNoDuplicate.tlua:14:22: 'v' was also declared here.
    
    // A name repeated within a SINGLE body is a genuine duplicate identifier.
    interface WithinBody { dup: number, dup: number }
                           ~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'dup'.
                                        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'dup'.
    
    // Same distinction for a type literal body.
    type Lit = { p: number, p: number }
                 ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'p'.
                            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'p'.
